description.ko: 고대 우주 먼지에 둘러싸인 거대하고 빛나는 특이점 근처에서 빛이 휘어지고 시간이 느려지는 우주의 가장 먼 곳으로 떠나는 여정입니다.
description.en: A journey into the furthest reaches of the universe where light bends and time slows near a massive, glowing singularity surrounded by ancient cosmic dust.

prompt: VOID-3 aesthetic, cosmic deep, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic, super-massive black hole with a vibrant glowing accretion disk, swirling purple and gold nebulae, deep space void, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, stars flickering in the extreme distance, obsidian darkness, ethereal and haunting atmosphere.
